title: FailuresResourceResponse (SP-006)
description: Response shape for the corpus://failures MCP read-only resource. Mirrors the SP-002 corpus://recent paginated pattern. Per-entry shape preserves the SP-003 verbatim sidecar schema (doc_id, stage, error_code, message, timestamp, retriable) plus the SP-006-added sidecar_path field.

entries.description: Paginated, post-filter entries. Ordered descending by timestamp (most-recent failure first). Length equals returned_count and is bounded by limit (default 50; hard cap 1000).

total_count.description: Post-filter, pre-pagination count of FailureEntry records discovered in Paths.failed(). May be ≥ entries.length when offset > 0 or total exceeds limit.

returned_count.description: Equals entries.length. Equals min(total_count - offset, limit).

schema_version.description: Schema version for forward compatibility. SP-006 ships version 1; future SP-007+ may ship version 2 additively.

doc_id.description: Document ID if assigned at failure time; null for pre-persist failures (e.g., ingest validation before doc_id was generated).

stage.description: Pipeline stage that produced the failure. Closed enum extending the SP-003 stage column with SP-006's 'unrecoverable_orphan' for recovery-scanner non-resumable sidecars.

message.description: Human-readable diagnostic message. Constitution V bounded; never includes body content (Constitution I).

timestamp.description: ISO-8601 timestamp from the sidecar. Sort key for pagination (descending).

retriable.description: Whether the operator should retry the underlying operation. SP-003-written; SP-006 surfaces verbatim. Recovery-sidecars (error_code='unrecoverable_orphan') always have retriable=false.

sidecar_path.description: SP-006-added: absolute path to the sidecar under Paths.failed() so operators can rm after triaging. Always within Paths.failed() (Constitution XIV).

FailuresQuery.description: Parsed query parameters for the corpus://failures resource handler. All fields optional with defaults.

stage.description: Filter by stage (closed enum). Unknown values produce a validation_error envelope as a successful resource response.

since.description: Only include entries with timestamp >= since.

limit.description: Pagination size. Default 50 is conservative for typical inspection workflows; hard cap 1000.

ValidationErrorEnvelope.description: Returned as a successful MCP resource response when query parameters fail Zod validation. NOT a JSON-RPC transport error. Mirrors SP-005 FR-RETRIEVAL-004 envelope pattern.

error_code.description: Closed enum. 'validation_error' for invalid query parameters; 'internal_error' for adapter / Zod-validation failures during response shaping.
